title: IPL 2026: Rishabh Pant Should Bat at No. 3, Faf du Plessis
description: Pant shuffled his batting position from being No. 4 to opener and also lower down the order in a woeful last season. But he finally produced his best at No. 3 -- a 61-ball unbeaten 118 in Lucknow Super Giants' last league match.
